title: Latest News from Science Magazine
description: Keyword search result for Alerts: News Weekly Headlines -- New results matching your keyword search query (updated daily).

items.title: Pesticides may wreak havoc on the gut microbiome
items.description: Disruption of intestinal ecosystem could contribute to diabetes and other health issues, scientists say

items.title: Department of Energy’s AI push squeezes funding for research grants
items.description: Tapping already strained budgets, Genesis Mission gives scientists just weeks to apply for first awards

items.title: Artemis II captures an ‘Earthset’ and stunning views of the Moon
items.description: First crewed Moon mission since 1972 caught extraordinary glimpses of lunar terrain

items.title: The hidden math behind satisfying can-crushing videos
items.description: Fluid-filled soda cans confirm a long-untested theory of pattern formation

items.title: As Japan warms, cherry blossom displays are fading
items.description: Some trees in southern Japan are already failing to reach peak bloom—a trend researchers predict will move north in the coming decades

items.title: Relics of an ancient sandstorm on Mars point to Earth-like winds
items.description: Curiosity rover finds what may be the first direct evidence that Mars once had a thick atmosphere

items.title: As war escalates, Iran’s universities face increasing fire
items.description: Attacks have destroyed or damaged a wide range of academic and commercial research centers

items.title: AIs can ‘memorize’ data they shouldn’t. Can they be forced to forget?
items.description: New tool could help researchers probe how models “unlearn” sensitive training material

items.title: U.S. Forest Service unveils extensive closures of research facilities
items.description: Cost-cutting move is expected to cause resignations and turmoil

items.title: Slasher sequel: Trump again proposes major cuts to U.S. science spending
items.description: Science advocates urge Congress to reject 2027 budget plan
